text:
OK.

In the quiet village of Willow Vale, there lived a lonely old bard named Orsen. He had no friends but birds. He would wander through the woods.

One day, he came across a circle of stones. They shimmered blue.

That's my spot! he thought.

Each evening he'd sit there with his guitar. That was when things happened.

A deer danced.

His birds came singing.

The sun peeked.

All knew.

Sometimes he'd laugh till tears came. Sometimes he'd sit.

Once, he decided to leave.

A shadow fell.

Behind it was her, elegant, tall.

A woman?

He'd never seen her.

She smiled.

Stay then.

A kiss.

Now you've got me.

Now I know.

Tell me.

Time flies. Love feels.

Her ways.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
